title: Leptorkis cordifolia
taxonomy: Leptorkis cordifolia is classified as a species within the genus Leptorkis and the family Zingiberaceae. It is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as a ginger plant. The Zingiberaceae family consists of various species of gingers and their relatives. Leptorkis cordifolia is native to tropical regions and is often found in forests and grasslands. This classification places Leptorkis cordifolia among the monocotyledonous plants, which have one cotyledon in their seeds.
